context.label: New Jedi Order / Yuuzhan Vong War

continuity.sourceBoundary: Legends New Jedi Order era, from Vector Prime and the first Yuuzhan Vong invasion through The Unifying Force and the war settlement. Excludes Dark Nest, Legacy of the Force, Fate of the Jedi, and Disney canon outcomes except as future guards.
continuity.notes: Development deck. Keep separate from Disney canon and later post-NJO Legends unless a later deck is active.

content.fact: Yuuzhan Vong tools, ships, weapons, armor, and communication are largely living or bioengineered instead of mechanical.
content.injection: For Yuuzhan Vong material culture, default to living biotech and religious taboo against machines. Treat conflicting later-era or alternate-continuity model memory as out of context unless the user explicitly selects that branch.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: New Jedi Order / Yuuzhan Vong War.
Keep retrieval topic/entity-gated; this wide-context card should not flood unrelated scenes.

entries.title: Vonduun Crab Armor Resists Standard Assumptions

context.label: New Jedi Order / Yuuzhan Vong War

continuity.sourceBoundary: Legends New Jedi Order era, from Vector Prime and the first Yuuzhan Vong invasion through The Unifying Force and the war settlement. Excludes Dark Nest, Legacy of the Force, Fate of the Jedi, and Disney canon outcomes except as future guards.

content.fact: Vonduun crab armor is living armor that changes combat assumptions against blasters and lightsabers.
content.injection: When vonduun crab armor is present, do not let ordinary shots or casual saber strikes automatically end the fight. Use this as a background rule only; narrower active era/source cards should override it.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: New Jedi Order / Yuuzhan Vong War.
Keep retrieval topic/entity-gated; this wide-context card should not flood unrelated scenes.

entries.title: Vong Are Absent or Outside Normal Force Perception

context.label: New Jedi Order / Yuuzhan Vong War

continuity.sourceBoundary: Legends New Jedi Order era, from Vector Prime and the first Yuuzhan Vong invasion through The Unifying Force and the war settlement. Excludes Dark Nest, Legacy of the Force, Fate of the Jedi, and Disney canon outcomes except as future guards.
continuity.notes: Development deck. Keep separate from Disney canon and later post-NJO Legends unless a later deck is active.

content.fact: Yuuzhan Vong presence disrupts normal Jedi assumptions because they are not sensed through the Force in ordinary ways.
content.injection: Jedi should not easily sense Yuuzhan Vong emotions, life-presence, or intent through normal Force perception unless context establishes an exception. Use this as a background rule only; narrower active era/source cards should override it.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: New Jedi Order / Yuuzhan Vong War.
Keep retrieval topic/entity-gated; this wide-context card should not flood unrelated scenes.

entries.title: Vong Force Absence Is Not Total Plot Armor

context.label: New Jedi Order / Yuuzhan Vong War

continuity.sourceBoundary: Legends New Jedi Order era, from Vector Prime and the first Yuuzhan Vong invasion through The Unifying Force and the war settlement. Excludes Dark Nest, Legacy of the Force, Fate of the Jedi, and Disney canon outcomes except as future guards.
continuity.notes: Development deck. Keep separate from Disney canon and later post-NJO Legends unless a later deck is active.

content.fact: Yuuzhan Vong Force absence complicates Jedi perception and technique but does not make them immune to all tactics, physics, or strategy.
content.injection: Do not use Force absence as universal invulnerability; preserve ordinary combat, strategy, and environmental consequences. Use this as a background rule only; narrower active era/source cards should override it.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: New Jedi Order / Yuuzhan Vong War.
Keep retrieval topic/entity-gated; this wide-context card should not flood unrelated scenes.
